---
title: "Kernel: Amoroso"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Kernel: Amoroso}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  cache = TRUE,
  cache.path = "cache/kernel-amoroso-",
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

# Make package helpers available even when the namespace is only loaded
build_nimble_bundle <- getFromNamespace("build_nimble_bundle", "DPmixGPD")

# Locate cached fits when pkgdown builds without installing the package
resolve_extdata_file <- function(name) {
  candidates <- c(
    system.file("extdata", name, package = "DPmixGPD"),
    file.path("inst", "extdata", name),
    file.path("..", "inst", "extdata", name),
    file.path("..", "..", "inst", "extdata", name)
  )
  existing <- candidates[file.exists(candidates) & nzchar(candidates)]
  if (length(existing) == 0) stop(sprintf("Extdata file %s not found", name))
  existing[[1]]
}
```

```{r kernel-amoroso}
library(DPmixGPD)
library(nimble)
use_cached_fit <- TRUE
.fit_path <- resolve_extdata_file
fit_small <- readRDS(.fit_path("fit_small.rds"))
w <- c(0.6, 0.4)
loc <- c(0.0, 0.5)
scale <- c(1.0, 1.4)
shape1 <- c(1.0, 1.0)
shape2 <- c(2.0, 3.0)

x <- 1.0
p <- 0.9

dAmorosoMix(x, w = w, loc = loc, scale = scale, shape1 = shape1, shape2 = shape2, log = FALSE)
pAmorosoMix(x, w = w, loc = loc, scale = scale, shape1 = shape1, shape2 = shape2,
            lower.tail = TRUE, log.p = FALSE)
qAmorosoMix(p, w = w, loc = loc, scale = scale, shape1 = shape1, shape2 = shape2)

threshold <- 1.2
tail_scale <- 0.9
tail_shape <- 0.2

dAmorosoMixGpd(x, w = w, loc = loc, scale = scale, shape1 = shape1, shape2 = shape2,
               threshold = threshold, tail_scale = tail_scale, tail_shape = tail_shape)
qAmorosoMixGpd(0.99, w = w, loc = loc, scale = scale, shape1 = shape1, shape2 = shape2,
               threshold = threshold, tail_scale = tail_scale, tail_shape = tail_shape)

set.seed(1)
y <- rgamma(30, shape = 2, scale = 1)

bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
  y = y,
  backend = "sb",
  kernel = "amoroso",
  GPD = TRUE,
  components = 6
)

bundle$spec$meta
```

```{r session}
sessionInfo()
```
